rule_metadata.name: recon_archy
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'recon-archy' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule recon_archy
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'recon-archy' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "recon-archy"
		rule_category = "offensive_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = /\/recon\-archy\.git/ nocase ascii wide
		$string2 = "recon-archy analyse" nocase ascii wide
		$string3 = "recon-archy build" nocase ascii wide
		$string4 = "recon-archy crawl" nocase ascii wide
		$string5 = "recon-archy-master" nocase ascii wide
		$string6 = "remiflavien1/recon-archy" nocase ascii wide
		$string7 = "shadawck/recon-archy" nocase ascii wide

	condition:
		any of them
}
